articles.title: Introducing the Google Colab CLI
articles.snippet: Google has announced the Google Colab Command-Line Interface (CLI), a new tool that allows developers and AI agents to connect local terminals to remote Colab runtimes for frictionless execution. The lightweight CLI enables users to easily request high-powered GPUs, run local Python scripts remotely, and seamlessly retrieve artifact logs or models like fine-tuned Gemma 3 adapters.
